# v2.0.10

## Changes

- Batched AI reviews now scan all merge request changes before applying `max_batches`, so required, planned, and completed batch counts remain visible instead of silently omitting later files.
- Review coverage records fully reviewed, partially reviewed, and unreviewed files together with the exact raw diff bytes included in model prompts.
- Oversized single-file diffs and files omitted by the batch limit are tracked separately, while batch failures and total review deadlines preserve already completed coverage.
- Coverage aggregates and incomplete-file details are stored in SQLite and shown in Dashboard run details without changing GitLab review comments.
- Dashboard run and finding lists no longer display run IDs or task-count ratios; the full run ID remains available in run details.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.10-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.10-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
